challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge1.de: Your current XP level determines the item you receive.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge2.de: Blocks do not drop any items when broken.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge3.de: Mobs do not drop any items when killed.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge4.de: Chests do not contain any loot.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge5.de: Players do not naturally regenerate health.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge7.de: Allows you to adjust the maximum health of all players.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge9.de: The world border size is determined by your XP level.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge10.d: Receive a random item every 30 seconds.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge11.d: The world generates as a Skyblock.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge12.d: Allows you to limit the number of available inventory slots.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge13.d: Receive a random enchantment every 30 seconds to the item you are holding.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge14.d: Blocks drop random items when broken.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge15.d: Mobs drop random items when killed.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge16.d: Chunks are filled with random blocks.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge17.d: Receive a random item for every 500 blocks walked.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge18.d: Receive a random item for every heart of damage taken.
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge19.d: Mining a block applies a random level 1 potion effect (consistent per block/world).
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge20.d: All crafting recipes are randomized and switched.
challengecraft.warning.tainted: Warning: Changing challenges mid-game sets difficulty to 0!
challengecraft.reward.no_xp: No XP earned because challenges were changed in-game.
challengecraft.reward.title: Challenge successfully completed!
challengecraft.worldcreate.challenge21.d: No death allowed. If the player dies, the challenge fails and difficulty multiplier is set to 0.
challengecraft.hardcore.failed.desc: Player died in Hardcore Challenge. No XP can be earned from now on.
challengecraft.tainted.failed.desc: No XP can be earned due to mid-game challenge changes.
